## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -x -q` passes locally
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if you added or renamed env vars
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under the next version's Added / Changed / Fixed section
- [ ] Bilingual fields (`*_en` / `*_zh`) included if you touched UI strings or user-visible docs
- [ ] No real personal info, internal hostnames, or company-specific names in tests / examples
